retrieved_note: Re-verified 2026-05-25 against bankislami.com.pk product pages, the Jan-Jun 2026 Schedule of Charges PDF, and Titanium Debit Mastercard FAQ/T&C PDFs. Public pages publish no salary, age, or per-card balance thresholds for standard debit cards; the 2026 SOC is authoritative for fees.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Free for BIPL staff salary accounts (per Jan-Jun 2026 SOC, section 11).

notes: Verified PKR 2,900 issuance / annual subscription / replacement on Jan-Jun 2026 SOC, section 4.A (Digital Delivery Channels), p.7.
Product page (https://bankislami.com.pk/digital-channel/debitcards/classic-debit-mastercard/) is descriptive only — publishes no salary, balance, age, or fee figures.

Card is account-linked: T&C definitions reference a 'Linked Account' (Current, PLS Savings, or Roshan Digital). Balance threshold therefore inherits from the underlying account, which varies — most BankIslami accounts have no minimum opening balance per the Digital Onboarding product brief.

Mashal Women Banking offers 50% discount on Classic / PayPak debit issuance and annual subscription on Mashal Asaan, and FREE Classic / PayPak issuance + annual subscription on Mashal Saving with PKR 100,000 average balance (SOC Jan-Jun 2026, section 13).
Gen Z Account holders get Classic Debit Mastercard free (SOC section 15).

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Free for BIPL staff salary accounts (per Jan-Jun 2026 SOC, section 11).

notes: Verified PKR 1,800 issuance / annual subscription / replacement on Jan-Jun 2026 SOC, section 4.A, p.7.
Product page (https://bankislami.com.pk/digital-channel/debitcards/paypak-debit-card/) is descriptive only — publishes no salary, balance, age, or fee figures.
Card is account-linked; balance threshold inherits from underlying account, which varies. Most BankIslami accounts have no minimum maintenance balance.
Mashal Women Banking offers 50% discount on PayPak issuance/annual subscription, and free PayPak with PKR 100,000 average balance on Mashal Saving.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Free issuance and replacement for Priority Banking customers (PKR 3 million combined quarterly-average relationship balance) per Jan-Jun 2026 SOC, section 12.

notes: Verified PKR 4,000 issuance / annual subscription / replacement on Jan-Jun 2026 SOC, section 4.A, p.7.

Corrected: prior pilot recorded a PKR 25,000 average-balance fee waiver, but the SOC, the Titanium FAQ PDF, and the Titanium T&C PDF contain no such waiver. The PKR 25,000 average balance figure in BankIslami's Digital Onboarding brief is the Islami Sahulat Account 'free services' threshold (free chequebook / pay orders / online banking / e-statement etc.), not a Titanium card fee waiver.

T&C clause 10 explicitly states the cardholder 'undertakes to pay all bank charges in respect of annual subscription, renewal/replacement fee of the CARD ... in accordance with Bank's Schedule of Charges'.

Priority Titanium Debit Mastercard (a separate Priority Banking variant) is FREE for issuance and replacement, gated by PKR 3 million combined quarterly-average balance per SOC section 12. Modeled here as the Titanium card's published waiver since it is the same Mastercard tier under a different relationship segment.

Card is account-linked: T&C definitions reference a 'Linked Account' (Current, PLS Savings, or Roshan Digital). No standalone salary or balance threshold for the ordinary Titanium card is publicly disclosed.

gaps: No clear public consumer credit-card catalogue was found in this pass — BankIslami appears to publish only debit cards on its public site.
Public product pages do not publish salary, age, or per-card balance thresholds for any debit card. The SOC is the only authoritative public source for fees.

Income document, salary transfer, CNIC, and existing account flags are derived from account-opening conventions (BankIslami requires a linked Rupee current / savings or Roshan Digital account, which itself requires a CNIC); they are not stated card-by-card on the product pages.
